title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Vodafone Idea

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Vodafone Idea
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vodafone Idea family as a Software Engineer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vodafone Idea:
Vodafone Idea is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea!
